rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one claim (the forward-pointer) but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (introducing a forward-pointer that may not be necessary).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is traced, but major rewrites are not annotated with source and reason.
